---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
df=read.csv(file.choose())
df
```
```{r}
head(df)
```
```{r}
colnames(df)
```
```{r}
library(janitor)
df <- clean_names(df)

colnames(df)
```
```{r}
data <- df[, c("annual_income_k", "spending_score_1_100")]

scaled_data <- scale(data)

set.seed(123)
kmeans_model <- kmeans(scaled_data, centers = 5)
kmeans_model
df$cluster <- kmeans_model$cluster
df$cluster
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(df, aes(x = annual_income_k, y = spending_score_1_100, color = as.factor(cluster))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  ggtitle("Customer Segmentation")
```
